title: LEGO Star Wars: The Clone Wars Plo Koon’s Jedi Starfighter Microfighter, Collectible Building Toy for Kids, Gift for Boys, Girls and Fans Aged 6 Years Old and Over, Includes a Blue Lightsaber 75400
features: Microscale LEGO Star Wars building toy – Introduce young kids to Star Wars: The Clone Wars adventures with this quick-build LEGO Star Wars Microfighters version of Plo Koon’s Jedi Starfighter
Plo Koon LEGO minifigure – This fantasy building set includes the Star Wars character Plo Koon with a blue Lightsaber that clips to the underside of the Microfighter
The first-ever LEGO Star Wars Microfighters building model of a Jedi starfighter – This miniature Jedi starfighter in Plo Koon’s own colours has a cockpit for a LEGO minifigure and 2 stud shooters
Hours of pretend play – The set also includes the head of R7-D4, which attaches to the fuselage in front of the cockpit so the trusty Star Wars droid can accompany Plo Koon on his missions
Star Wars gift for boys, girls and any fans aged 6 years old and over – This LEGO Star Wars starship building toy makes an exciting anytime surprise gift for creative kids
Explore the range – This set is part of a fun collection of quick-build LEGO Star Wars Microfighters (sold separately), which can be matched up for even more brick-built action
LEGO Star Wars collectible sets – LEGO Star Wars sets (sold separately) enable kids and adult Star Wars fans to relive classic scenes, create new adventures or simply display the buildable models
Built for action play and display – The Microfighter buildable toy vehicle in this 89-piece set measures over 3 cm (1 in.) high, 11 cm (4.5 in.) long and 8 cm (3 in.) wide
description: From the manufacturer Fantasy LEGO Star Wars building toy for kids Introduce young kids to Star Wars: The Clone Wars adventures with this Microfighter version of Plo Koon’s Jedi starfighter. The action starts fast This is the first-ever LEGO Star Wars Microfighters version of a Jedi starfighter, and it’s designed for quick-building. LEGO Star Wars Plo Koon’s Jedi Starfighter Microfighter Cockpit Place the Plo Koon LEGO minifigure in the cockpit. Astromech droid co-pilot The head of R7-D4 attaches to the fuselage. Made for fun battles Target enemies with the 2 stud shooters. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. Anytime treat for young kids This LEGO brick toy starship makes an exciting surprise gift for boys, girls and any Star Wars fans aged 6 years old and over.
